entries.title: Project Overview - PDR
entries.description: Product Design Record: CLI tool for managing AI agent kit installations across Claude Code, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot. Defines 32 commands, goals, success metrics, and target users.

entries.title: Codebase Summary
entries.description: High-level overview of 8,200+ LOC codebase: 4-layer architecture, 32 commands, 15 domain areas, test coverage, and key files with LOC breakdown.

entries.title: System Architecture
entries.description: 4-layer clean architecture design: CLI → Commands → Domains → Services/Shared. Core algorithms (topological sort, smart merge, YAML parser), data flow, file safety system, and 15 domain responsibilities.

entries.title: Code Standards
entries.description: Development conventions: kebab-case naming, <200 LOC modularization, TypeScript strict mode, error handling, testing targets (70% coverage), and git commit format (conventional commits).

entries.title: Project Roadmap
entries.description: Release roadmap: v2.0.0 complete (32 commands, multi-platform, 103 tests), v0.2.0 planned (semver constraints, caching), phases 1-2 complete, phases 3-4 future. Includes contribution guidelines.

entries.title: Cursor Adapter Strategy
entries.description: Decision: Use shared ClaudeAdapter for both Claude and Cursor targets (pass-through approach). Cursor agents use same .md + YAML format as Claude Code; unsupported fields are silently ignored. Add warning collection for incompatible features.

entries.title: VS Code Native Claude Detection Strategy
entries.description: Decision: Keep full duplication strategy in CopilotAdapter for .github/agents/. VS Code reads .claude/ natively but full duplication ensures VS Code-only users have agents accessible via explicit convention. Add dual-target detection warning.

entries.title: Fix Install Scripts - Install Completes but Binary Not Found
entries.description: Post-mortem: Install scripts were incomplete (no npm build/link). Root cause: script treated CLI as data package, not binary tool. Fixed by adding build + link steps. Lesson: always test happy path to completion.
